film.title: Mickey Virus
film.overview: When Delhi Police comes across an unusual case revolving around hacking they seek help of an expert who thinks like them only to come across a lazy hacker Mickey Arora.

dialogues.dialogue: we also didn't take any interest in it. I mean... it wasn't worth the effort so...I want that small-time crook Kung-fu Chameli. Don't you have any shame? Why will I crash your college server for you? Is the money ready?
I will not accept defeat now. I will defeat destiny. The pride and attitude. Where did this mud in her nails come from? I will erase it.

We slow-pokes are betterthan......an internet virus like you. What was the point of your education......if you wanted to be a thief in the end? Encoded By Zaeem Remember even Raavan lost his pride. My son's a big fan of yours. He always says A real police officer..."...should be like yourACP not you".
dialogues.cause_raw: admiration for a real police officer
